response.step_by_step_log:
1.  Identified the song title "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari" from the top-left corner text.
2.  Recognized it as a cover of "365 Nichi no Kamihikouki" by AKB48, performed in Indonesian by JKT48 (and covered here by VTubers Iofi and Reine).
3.  Used the search query: "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari" JKT48 Indonesian and English lyrics.
4.  Found the lyrics on Genius and Lyricstranslate.
5.  Mapped the performance to the 00:00-00:18 segment.
6.  The remainder of the video (00:19-05:00) is dialogue/conversation.
response.global_summary: The video shows a performance of the song "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari" (Indonesian cover of "365 Nichi no Kamihikouki" by AKB48) by virtual YouTubers Airani Iofifteen and Pavolia Reine, followed by a conversation between the two performers.

scenes.description: The two virtual characters perform the song "Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari". The song title is displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Kutatap langit di pagi hari.
Kuawali hari dengan doa.
Semoga satu hari ini bisa dipenuhi oleh senyum.
Walaupun terkadang hujan turun.
Hidup bagaikan pesawat kertas.
Terbang dan membawa cinta kita semua.
Sayap yang terbentang dengan percaya diri.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I look at the sky in the morning.
I start the day with a prayer.
Hopefully this one day can be filled with smiles.
Even though sometimes it rains.
Life is like a paper plane.
Flying and carrying our love for everyone.
Wings stretched out with confidence.
